name: zerosync
description: Browser-native federated continual learning with deterministic time-travel and verifiable aggregation

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../hardhat && npm install
scripts.hardhat:deploy: cd hardhat && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.check:syntax: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const fs=require('fs');function walk(d){let r=[];for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=d+'/'+e.name;if(e.isDirectory()&&!e.name.startsWith('.')&&e.name!=='node_modules')r=r.concat(walk(p));else if(e.name.endsWith('.js'))r.push(p);}return r;}walk('.').forEach(f=>{try{execSync('node --check '+f,{stdio:'pipe'});console.log('OK: '+f);}catch(e){console.error('FAIL: '+f);console.error(e.stderr.toString());process.exitCode=1;}})"
